item.title: Account Position Calculator USDTRY
item.description: In financial markets, for investors engaged in leveraged trading, accurately reporting account positions is of critical importance.

item.title: Second Article
item.description:
Hello again! This is my second English demo article.
Here I continue experimenting with Hugo’s multi‑language setup and PaperMod theme.

item.title: First Article
item.description: Hello! This is my first English demo article.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
👋 Hi there, I’m Vural Pekyilmaz

I am a software specialist with extensive experience in software development, financial technologies, blockchain, and algorithmic trading. Throughout my career, I have contributed to projects in electronic publishing, media technologies, and financial operations. My expertise covers smart contract development, cryptocurrency wallets, trading systems, large-scale data integrations, and financial applications.

My technical skills include Solidity, Web3, JSON-RPC integrations, node setups, real-time communication systems, advertising integration, and CRM development. In addition, I have comprehensive experience with the MetaTrader 5 (MT5) platform and MQL5 language, developing algorithmic trading scripts and Expert Advisors (EAs), margin and risk calculations, order management, and backtesting processes.

item.title: Home
item.description:
I am a software specialist with extensive experience in software development, financial technologies, blockchain, and algorithmic trading. Throughout my career, I have contributed to projects in electronic publishing, media technologies, and financial operations. My expertise covers smart contract development, cryptocurrency wallets, trading systems, large-scale data integrations, and financial applications.

My technical skills include Solidity, Web3, JSON-RPC integrations, node setups, real-time communication systems, advertising integration, and CRM development. In addition, I have comprehensive experience with the MetaTrader 5 (MT5) platform and MQL5 language, developing algorithmic trading scripts and Expert Advisors (EAs), margin and risk calculations, order management, and backtesting processes.
